Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.diff

Class TextOnly

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.diff.TextOnly
All Implemented Interfaces:
DiffWriter, AutoCloseable
public final class TextOnly
extends Object
A diff writer that does not use ANSI escape codes.

    static String DIFF_PADDING
    A padding character used to align values vertically.
